_meta.source: FIFA World Cup 26 Competition Regulations, Annex C, as tabulated on Wikipedia (2026_FIFA_World_Cup_knockout_stage)
_meta.notes: r32_assignments maps each group-winner slot (1A,1B,1D,1E,1G,1I,1K,1L) to the third-placed team (3X) it faces, for this specific combination of 8 qualifying groups.
